next_steps: SSH tunnel: ssh -L 18789:127.0.0.1:18789 hdc@<vm-ip> then open http://127.0.0.1:18789
Paste gateway token from vault HDC_OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN in Control UI Settings if prompted.
Add messaging channels in clumps/services/openclaw/config.json openclaw.channels[] then run maintain.
Pin openclaw.version in config after first successful deploy.
